## Highlights

- **Resolved & handled moments** — the post-meeting timeline now marks moments you already defused or answered in **green ("Resolved")**, with a one-line note on *how* you handled them. Challenges you handled well show up as wins, not just open problems.
- **Reply coach builds on your response** — when you've already addressed a moment, "How to reply" now factors in what you actually said: reinforcing what worked or strengthening a weak attempt, instead of starting from scratch.

## Changes

- macOS builds are now **Apple Silicon (arm64) only**.

## Fixes

- Fixed the release pipeline so builds produce artifacts again — the Opus audio dependency could not cross-compile, which had broken the v0.3.0 and v0.4.0 builds.
